packages.description: Shim to allow support of different psr/message versions.

packages.name: nette/application

packages.name: nette/bootstrap
packages.description: 🅱  Nette Bootstrap: the simple way to configure and bootstrap your Nette application.

packages.name: nette/caching
packages.description: ⏱ Nette Caching: library with easy-to-use API and many cache backends.

packages.name: nette/component-model
packages.description: ⚛ Nette Component Model

packages.name: nette/database
packages.description: 💾 Nette Database: layer with a familiar PDO-like API but much more powerful. Building queries, advanced joins, drivers for MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite, MS SQL Server and Oracle.

packages.name: nette/di
packages.description: 💎 Nette Dependency Injection Container: Flexible, compiled and full-featured DIC with perfectly usable autowiring and support for all new PHP features.

packages.name: nette/finder
packages.description: 🔍 Nette Finder: find files and directories with an intuitive API.

packages.name: nette/forms
packages.description: 📝 Nette Forms: generating, validating and processing secure forms in PHP. Handy API, fully customizable, server & client side validation and mature design.

packages.name: nette/http

suggest.ext-fileinfo: to detect MIME type of uploaded files by Nette\Http\FileUpload
suggest.ext-gd: to use image function in Nette\Http\FileUpload

packages.description: 🌐 Nette Http: abstraction for HTTP request, response and session. Provides careful data sanitization and utility for URL and cookies manipulation.

packages.name: nette/mail

suggest.ext-fileinfo: to detect type of attached files

packages.description: 📧 Nette Mail: handy email creation and transfer library for PHP with both text and MIME-compliant support.

packages.name: nette/neon
packages.description: 🍸 Nette NEON: encodes and decodes NEON file format.

packages.description: 🐘 Nette PHP Generator: generates neat PHP code for you. Supports new PHP 8.1 features.

packages.name: nette/robot-loader
packages.description: 🍀 Nette RobotLoader: high performance and comfortable autoloader that will search and autoload classes within your application.

packages.name: nette/routing
packages.description: Nette Routing: two-ways URL conversion

packages.name: nette/schema
packages.description: 📐 Nette Schema: validating data structures against a given Schema.

packages.name: nette/security
packages.description: 🔑 Nette Security: provides authentication, authorization and a role-based access control management via ACL (Access Control List)

packages.name: nette/tester
packages.description: Nette Tester: enjoyable unit testing in PHP with code coverage reporter. 🍏🍏🍎🍏

packages.name: nette/utils

suggest.ext-iconv: to use Strings::webalize(), toAscii(), chr() and reverse()
suggest.ext-intl: to use Strings::webalize(), toAscii(), normalize() and compare()
suggest.ext-xml: to use Strings::length() etc. when mbstring is not available

packages.description: 🛠  Nette Utils: lightweight utilities for string & array manipulation, image handling, safe JSON encoding/decoding, validation, slug or strong password generating etc.

packages.name: paragonie/random_compat

suggest.ext-libsodium: Provides a modern crypto API that can be used to generate random bytes.

packages.description: PHP 5.x polyfill for random_bytes() and random_int() from PHP 7

packages.name: phpmailer/phpmailer

suggest.ext-mbstring: Needed to send email in multibyte encoding charset or decode encoded addresses
suggest.ext-openssl: Needed for secure SMTP sending and DKIM signing
suggest.greew/oauth2-azure-provider: Needed for Microsoft Azure XOAUTH2 authentication
suggest.symfony/polyfill-mbstring: To support UTF-8 if the Mbstring PHP extension is not enabled (^1.2)

packages.description: PHPMailer is a full-featured email creation and transfer class for PHP

packages.description: Common interface for HTTP clients

packages.description: PSR-17: Common interfaces for PSR-7 HTTP message factories

packages.description: Common interface for logging libraries

packages.name: ralouphie/getallheaders
packages.description: A polyfill for getallheaders.

packages.name: setasign/fpdi

suggest.setasign/fpdf: FPDI will extend this class but as it is also possible to use TCPDF or tFPDF as an alternative. There's no fixed dependency configured.

packages.description: FPDI is a collection of PHP classes facilitating developers to read pages from existing PDF documents and use them as templates in FPDF. Because it is also possible to use FPDI with TCPDF, there are no fixed dependencies defined. Please see suggestions for packages which evaluates the dependencies automatically.

packages.name: symfony/deprecation-contracts
packages.description: A generic function and convention to trigger deprecation notices

packages.name: symfony/thanks
packages.description: Encourages sending ⭐ and 💵 to fellow PHP package maintainers (not limited to Symfony components)!

packages.name: tracy/tracy
packages.description: 😎  Tracy: the addictive tool to ease debugging PHP code for cool developers. Friendly design, logging, profiler, advanced features like debugging AJAX calls or CLI support. You will love it.
